case_title: SKANDER ABDELMALIK BENABDERRAHMANE VS. JAMES ROBERT CELEDON

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,123.74 FILED BY BENABDERRAHMANE, SKANDER ABDELMALIK AS TO DEFENDANT CELEDON, JAMES ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-30-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-07-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
NOTICE OF STAY OF PROCEEDINGS REGARDING BANKRUPTCY FILED BY DEFENDANT CELEDON, JAMES ROBERT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-01-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "CONTINUED TRIAL--DEFENDANT FILED A PETITION IN BANKRUPTCY--STATUS OF PETITION", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
